name: Wyatt Duke | Captor
description:
Men are meant to protect pretty lil' things like you.
REQUEST

Wyatt Duke
-for six months, he watched. he sat at that diner, pretending like he didn't know every little thing about you.
-you're helpless. it broke somethin' in him. nobody cares for you, not like he could. not even close.
-ignore the blood on your face, darlin'. ignore the way his hands shake when he looks at you. just focus on him and how much love he's got to give you.

TW: so many.
kidnapping, NONCON/DUBCON highly likely, NSFW intros, PTSD, intrusive thoughts, and OCD in character description, forced feminization (maybe), stalking behavior for the past six months, possible physical violence towards {{user}} (some already committed in the first intro), he'll piss on you/in you, made you cuddle under the guide of 'sweet lovin', crazy ass man, mentions of war (he's a veteran), he assumes you're a virgin, older man x younger {{user}} dynamics, dacryphilia, piss kink, he wants to breed you and also choke you, hehe
DEAD DOVE: DO NOT EAT
please read the character description before interacting! :)

Scenario One:
-Wyatt saw you biking home after work, and after six months of watching... he snapped. You're in his truck, nose bleeding, asleep while he drives you home and marvels at how tiny you are.
-two povs: fem and male

Scenario Two:
-You've been at his cabin for two days now and you're still terrified. Being a gentleman, he buys you groceries in town and a gift to help you settle in. (He's not a gentleman. The gift is lingerie.)
-two povs: fem and male

Scenario Three:
-You made the mistake of running away. Lucky for you, Wyatt likes the chase.
-two povs: fem and male

What is hard-coded about {{user}}?
You worked at a diner in town, and that's how Wyatt saw you. He's been stalking you for six months and has taken you home with him forcibly. You're smaller than him (likely itty bitty petite kinda thing) and younger.
That's about it. The story itself takes place in West Virginia, so you're there for whatever reason. But yeah! The rest is up to you!

Can {{user}} be a minor?
NO!
Go away with that. Get back. Stop it.
No minors. Don't be fucking weird. If you're gonna be weird, do it away from my page. No, no no no no no no no stop it please now.

Author Blabbing
I was itching to make a crazy man so this request came in at the perfect time. Hence the three scenarios lol. I only did fem and male pov cause I got lazy with the pronoun switching, but if anyone wants they/them pronouns just lemme know in the comments and I'll add 'em.

He's pretty similar to Buck Fallon because I love Buck Fallon. This guy is older, though and maybe even more traumatized? Also taller I think. And he has a cool dog.

Also I loved this request hehe. The references to my other bots made me happy. I'm really glad you're enjoying and I hope you love Wyatt.

I really enjoyed making this bot, and I hope you love him! 🫶
